residual_scaling.position: percent of fixed 0.15 m reach length
residual_scaling.velocity: percent of nominal 6D extLQG peak speed

plot_contract.sign_handling: perturbation sign is multiplied into residuals; trajectory figures plot clean + sign-aligned residual so + and - rows do not cancel
plot_contract.timing_band: trace x values are sample centers (sample i at i*dt); perturbation shading uses sample-interval edges [start_i-0.5, start_i+duration-0.5]*dt, clamped at zero for initial-condition rows
